summary: The document pertains to a recent update from the EU regulator concerning new Anti-Money Laundering (AML) reporting thresholds. The revised limit has been set at €5,000 and is to be implemented with immediate effect. The compliance team is tasked with the responsibility of aligning internal policies with this change. Additionally, the finance department should be informed to revise customer verification procedures accordingly.

tasks.description: Align internal policies with the new Anti-Money Laundering reporting thresholds set by the EU regulator
